About.p2: My journey into programming began with the curiosity of understanding how things work. Since then, I've been constantly learning and improving my skills.
About.p3: When I'm not coding, I enjoy exploring new technologies and sharing knowledge with other developers.

Testimonials.heading: What People Say About Me
Testimonials.sub: Opinions from professors, classmates and mentors who have worked with me

items.name: Sebastián Parra
items.content: Working with Andrés has been fantastic. His attention to detail and ability to create fluid interfaces raised the quality of our last project.

items.name: Alejandra Bernal
items.content: Andrés is a developer who perfectly understands design. He managed to implement my prototypes with incredible precision, also contributing excellent ideas.

items.name: Natalia Escobar
items.content: As a project manager, I highly value Andrés's commitment. He always meets deadlines and his proactive approach helped us avoid many issues.

items.name: Michel Briceño
items.content: Excellent team player. His client-side code integrates perfectly with our APIs, and he is always willing to collaborate.
